# Watering Your Balcony Plants Automatically

A drip irrigation kit for balcony planters waters each pot slowly at the root zone, keeping moisture steady while you are away. Kits connect to a tap or a reservoir and use a timer to run on a schedule. Setup takes under an hour for a typical balcony.

## Components you need

A timer, pressure reducer, main tubing, and adjustable drippers for each pot.

## Reservoir vs tap connection

Reservoir kits work where no outdoor tap exists; tap kits are simpler to refill-free.
